Index.meta_title: Cutting Edge Chat - AI-powered custom chatbots for your website.
Index.meta_description: Cutting Edge Chat delivers high-end custom AI chatbots built for your business. Engage your visitors with intelligent, on-brand conversations — no coding required.

Hero.title: Custom AI chatbots that <important>convert visitors into customers.</important>
Hero.description: Deploy a fully branded, intelligent chatbot on your website in minutes. Powered by the latest AI models — no coding required.

Features.section_title: Everything you need to deploy the perfect chatbot
Features.section_description: Built for businesses that want a smarter, faster way to engage website visitors and turn conversations into revenue.
Features.feature_description: Built to be flexible, powerful, and easy to use — so you can focus on your business, not the technology.

Pricing.section_title: Choose the plan that fits your business
Pricing.section_description: Start free and scale as you grow. Every plan includes a fully branded chatbot ready to deploy on your website.

FAQ.question: How quickly can I get a chatbot live on my website?
FAQ.answer: Most customers are up and running in under 10 minutes. After signing up and choosing your plan, you'll get a simple embed snippet to paste into your website. No developer needed.

CTA.title: Ready to engage your visitors?
CTA.description: Join businesses already using Cutting Edge Chat to turn website visitors into customers.
